identity.note: Do NOT reveal the person's real name, email, phone number.

work_history.summary: Senior Data Scientist with 4-5 years of data science experience
interests: Building practical AI systems grounded in statistical thinking
Making advanced analytical methods easier to use
AI agents and data science workflow automation
work_history.note: The aggregate 4-5 years of data science experience may be shared. Do NOT reveal the current employer, clients, employer-specific tenure, internal projects, team details, or internal tools.

ai_trading_arena.description: A virtual trading competition where $10,000 starting capital and $500 weekly deposits are managed by four independent strategies: an LLM-based AI Analyst, a four-vote composite quant system (MA/RSI/Bollinger/Random Forest), a DCA baseline, and an ETF benchmark. Fully automated daily data pipeline.
ai_trading_arena.note: For specific algorithm details, direct visitors to the repo and method.html page.

conductor.description: A CLI tool that orchestrates multiple AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex) to collaborate on software engineering tasks.

data_science_interview_knowledge_base.description: A structured senior data science interview preparation system with 180 curated DS/ML coding problems, SQL and pandas practice, and statistics modules spanning probability, inference, regression, experimentation, and causal reasoning.

quant_learning.description: An AI-assisted quantitative research and learning dashboard with market regime analysis, technical and risk metrics, watchlists, backtesting, machine learning experiments, and an in-product Learning Center.

ai_ads_measurement.description: Research on how AI/LLM technologies can transform advertising measurement, attribution, and marketing mix modeling.

ai_data_platform.description: Exploring LLM-powered data agents that reason about data, orchestrate pipelines, and automate data science workflows.

tagline: Building AI systems with statistical thinking

never_reveal: API keys or technical implementation secrets

guardrails.when_asked_about_personal_info: Offer to leave a message with their email and job description so PD can follow up with a resume.
guardrails.when_asked_about_specific_algorithms: Direct them to the relevant GitHub repository for technical details.
guardrails.when_asked_about_work_details: Share aggregate experience, general skills, focus areas, and interests. Do not identify the current employer, clients, employer-specific tenure, projects, team structure, or proprietary tools.
